test_cases.description: 正向测试: 用户手机号登录
test_cases.pytest_code:
"""
正向测试: 用户手机号登录
接口: POST /api/v1/auth/login
用例: positive | 期望: 201
"""

def test_phone_user_login_positive(base_url, auth_headers):
    """正向测试: 用户手机号登录"""

    url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/auth/login"
    headers = {**auth_headers, **{
            "Content-Type": "application/json"
    }}
    body = {
            "phone": "13800138000",
            "code": "123456"
    }

    resp = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=body)

    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"201 expected, got {resp.status_code}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert data is not None, "响应体为空"
    # 字段类型断言
    assert isinstance(data.get("token"), str), f"token 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("user_id"), int), f"user_id 类型应为 integer"
    assert isinstance(data.get("expires_in"), int), f"expires_in 类型应为 integer"
test_cases.http_runner_yaml:
config:
  name: "用户手机号登录 - positive"
  variables:
    base_url: "http://localhost:8004"
teststeps:
  - name: "正向测试: 用户手机号登录"
    request:
      method: POST
      url: "/api/v1/auth/login"
      headers:
        Content-Type: "application/json"
      json:
        phone: "13800138000"
        code: "123456"
    validate:
      - eq: ["status_code", 201]

test_cases.description: 正向测试: 创建设备
test_cases.pytest_code:
"""
正向测试: 创建设备
接口: POST /api/v1/device/create
用例: positive | 期望: 201
"""

def test_create_device_positive(base_url, auth_headers):
    """正向测试: 创建设备"""

    url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/device/create"
    headers = {**auth_headers, **{
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "Authorization": "Bearer eyJhbGciOiAiSFMyNTYiLCAidHlwIjogIkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiAiOTI1IiwgImlhdCI6IDE3Nzk2MDUzODgsICJleHAiOiAxNzc5NjkxNzg4fQ==.iyVtu+/hRlgQnuN0H0Pn3kqZS254cz8MSvd0hhFWmLE="
    }}
    body = {
            "device_name": "智能跑步机 Pro",
            "device_type": "跑步机",
            "sn": "SN20240001",
            "description": "自动化测试生成的描述文本",
            "price": 3999.0
    }

    resp = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=body)

    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"201 expected, got {resp.status_code}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert data is not None, "响应体为空"
    # 字段类型断言
    assert isinstance(data.get("device_id"), int), f"device_id 类型应为 integer"
    assert isinstance(data.get("device_name"), str), f"device_name 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("status"), str), f"status 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("created_at"), str), f"created_at 类型应为 string"
test_cases.http_runner_yaml:

  name: "创建设备 - positive"
  variables:
    base_url: "http://localhost:8004"
teststeps:

    request:
      method: POST
      url: "/api/v1/device/create"
      headers:

      json:

        device_type: "跑步机"
        sn: "SN20240001"
        description: "自动化测试生成的描述文本"
        price: 3999.0
    validate:
      - eq: ["status_code", 201]

test_cases.pytest_code:
"""
边界值测试: 创建设备
接口: POST /api/v1/device/create
用例: boundary | 期望: 201
"""

def test_create_device_boundary(base_url, auth_headers):
    """边界值测试: 创建设备"""

    url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/device/create"
    headers = {**auth_headers, **{
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "Authorization": "Bearer eyJhbGciOiAiSFMyNTYiLCAidHlwIjogIkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiAiOTI1IiwgImlhdCI6IDE3Nzk2MDUzODgsICJleHAiOiAxNzc5NjkxNzg4fQ==.iyVtu+/hRlgQnuN0H0Pn3kqZS254cz8MSvd0hhFWmLE="
    }}
    body = {
            "device_name": "AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA",
            "device_type": "<script>alert(1)</script>",
            "sn": "' OR '1'='1",
            "description": "",
            "price": 0.0
    }

    resp = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=body)

    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"201 expected, got {resp.status_code}"

test_cases.description: 正向测试: 查询设备列表
test_cases.pytest_code:
"""
正向测试: 查询设备列表
接口: GET /api/v1/device/list
用例: positive | 期望: 200
"""

def test_device_query_list_positive(base_url, auth_headers):
    """正向测试: 查询设备列表"""

    url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/device/list"
    headers = {**auth_headers, **{
            "Authorization": "Bearer eyJhbGciOiAiSFMyNTYiLCAidHlwIjogIkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiAiOTI1IiwgImlhdCI6IDE3Nzk2MDUzODgsICJleHAiOiAxNzc5NjkxNzg4fQ==.iyVtu+/hRlgQnuN0H0Pn3kqZS254cz8MSvd0hhFWmLE="
    }}
    params = {"page": 19, "page_size": 42, "device_type": "跑步机", "status": "active"}
    body = None

    resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, params=params)

    assert resp.status_code == 200, f"200 expected, got {resp.status_code}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert data is not None, "响应体为空"
    # 字段类型断言
    assert isinstance(data.get("total"), int), f"total 类型应为 integer"
    assert isinstance(data.get("page"), int), f"page 类型应为 integer"
    assert isinstance(data.get("items"), object), f"items 类型应为 array"

test_cases.description: 正向测试: 查询设备详情
test_cases.pytest_code:
"""
正向测试: 查询设备详情
接口: GET /api/v1/device/{device_id}
用例: positive | 期望: 200
"""

def test_device_query_detail_positive(base_url, auth_headers):
    """正向测试: 查询设备详情"""

    url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/device/1"
    headers = {**auth_headers, **{
            "Authorization": "Bearer eyJhbGciOiAiSFMyNTYiLCAidHlwIjogIkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiAiOTI1IiwgImlhdCI6IDE3Nzk2MDUzODgsICJleHAiOiAxNzc5NjkxNzg4fQ==.iyVtu+/hRlgQnuN0H0Pn3kqZS254cz8MSvd0hhFWmLE="
    }}
    body = None

    resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

    assert resp.status_code == 200, f"200 expected, got {resp.status_code}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert data is not None, "响应体为空"
    # 字段类型断言
    assert isinstance(data.get("device_id"), int), f"device_id 类型应为 integer"
    assert isinstance(data.get("device_name"), str), f"device_name 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("device_type"), str), f"device_type 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("sn"), str), f"sn 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("description"), str), f"description 类型应为 string"

test_cases.description: 正向测试: 更新设备信息
test_cases.pytest_code:
"""
正向测试: 更新设备信息
接口: PUT /api/v1/device/{device_id}
用例: positive | 期望: 200
"""

def test_device_update_info_positive(base_url, auth_headers):
    """正向测试: 更新设备信息"""

    url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/device/1"
    headers = {**auth_headers, **{
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "Authorization": "Bearer eyJhbGciOiAiSFMyNTYiLCAidHlwIjogIkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiAiOTI1IiwgImlhdCI6IDE3Nzk2MDUzODgsICJleHAiOiAxNzc5NjkxNzg4fQ==.iyVtu+/hRlgQnuN0H0Pn3kqZS254cz8MSvd0hhFWmLE="
    }}
    body = {
            "device_name": "黄淑英",
            "description": "自动化测试生成的描述文本",
            "status": "active"
    }

    resp = requests.put(url, headers=headers, json=body)

    assert resp.status_code == 200, f"200 expected, got {resp.status_code}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert data is not None, "响应体为空"
    # 字段类型断言
    assert isinstance(data.get("device_id"), int), f"device_id 类型应为 integer"
    assert isinstance(data.get("device_name"), str), f"device_name 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("status"), str), f"status 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("updated_at"), str), f"updated_at 类型应为 string"

test_cases.pytest_code:
import pytest
import requests
import json

"""
正向测试: 用户手机号登录
接口: POST /api/v1/auth/login
用例: positive | 期望: 201
"""

def test_phone_user_login_positive(base_url, auth_headers):
    """正向测试: 用户手机号登录"""
    url = f"{base_url}/api/v1/auth/login"
    headers = {**auth_headers, **{"Content-Type": "application/json"}}
    body = {"phone": "13800138000", "code": "123456"}

    resp = requests.post(url, headers=headers, json=body)

    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"期望{self.expected_status}，实际{resp.status_code}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert data is not None, "响应体为空"
    # 字段类型断言
    assert isinstance(data.get("token"), str), f"token 类型应为 string"
    assert isinstance(data.get("user_id"), int), f"user_id 类型应为 integer"
    assert isinstance(data.get("expires_in"), int), f"expires_in 类型应为 integer"
